# Pull Request Template

## Description

Please include a detailed summary of the changes, the problem solved, and the related issue reference.

Closes # (issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update (non-breaking chore/doc change)
- [ ] 🎨 Style / Formatting enhancement (non-functional visual tweak)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance optimization (makes code run faster/better)

## How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce.

- [ ] **Manual Testing**: Verified locally on local dev server.
- [ ] **Automated Testing**: Checked with jest/vitest unit or integration tests.
- [ ] **UI/UX Verification**: Validated layouts on mobile, tablet, and desktop viewport sizes.
- [ ] **Accessibility (a11y)**: Ensured proper semantic HTML and keyboard flow.

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules
- [ ] There are no security credentials or raw tokens committed
